label: Stat part (quality factor)
description: Multiplies the stat by a per-quality-level factor. Optional maxGain caps how much a quality tier can increase the value.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

applyToNegativeValues.label: Apply to negative values
applyToNegativeValues.description: If true, the quality factor is applied even when the base stat value is negative.

factorAwful.label: Factor (awful)
factorAwful.description: Stat multiplier for awful quality items.

factorPoor.label: Factor (poor)
factorPoor.description: Stat multiplier for poor quality items.

factorNormal.label: Factor (normal)
factorNormal.description: Stat multiplier for normal quality items.

factorGood.label: Factor (good)
factorGood.description: Stat multiplier for good quality items.

factorExcellent.label: Factor (excellent)
factorExcellent.description: Stat multiplier for excellent quality items.

factorMasterwork.label: Factor (masterwork)
factorMasterwork.description: Stat multiplier for masterwork quality items.

factorLegendary.label: Factor (legendary)
factorLegendary.description: Stat multiplier for legendary quality items.

maxGainAwful.label: Max gain (awful)
maxGainAwful.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at awful quality.

maxGainPoor.label: Max gain (poor)
maxGainPoor.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at poor quality.

maxGainNormal.label: Max gain (normal)
maxGainNormal.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at normal quality.

maxGainGood.label: Max gain (good)
maxGainGood.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at good quality.

maxGainExcellent.label: Max gain (excellent)
maxGainExcellent.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at excellent quality.

maxGainMasterwork.label: Max gain (masterwork)
maxGainMasterwork.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at masterwork quality.

maxGainLegendary.label: Max gain (legendary)
maxGainLegendary.description: Maximum absolute gain this part can contribute at legendary quality.
